reason: Lutonix-AV (NCT01710033) is the dialysis arteriovenous-access DCB pivotal — wrong indication for a peripheral PAD review; the peripheral Lutonix DCB trial is LEVANT-2 (NCT01412541).
CARTITUDE-4 evaluates ciltacabtagene autoleucel (anti-BCMA CAR-T) in relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma, not B-cell lymphoma; wrong disease for the review.
KARMMA-3 evaluates idecabtagene vicleucel (anti-BCMA CAR-T) in relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma, not B-cell lymphoma; wrong disease for the review.
COMPETE (NCT03049189) tests 177Lu-edotreotide (DOTATOC) vs everolimus in neuroendocrine tumours, not prostate cancer; prostate radioligand class is 177Lu-PSMA (e.g. VISION).
NCT02091375 is GWPCARE1, the cannabidiol Dravet trial (already used correctly at id 2085 in CBD_SEIZURE_REVIEW); here it is reassigned to fenfluramine — wrong drug for the NCT.
NCT00549523 is the DOMINO LCPUFA/cognition breastfeeding trial (Innis), not a donor-human-milk vs formula NEC trial; donor-milk-vs-formula NEC RCTs are DoMINO/Schanler with different NCTs.
Sparsentan FSGS pivotal is DUPLEX (NCT03493685); 'PEACE/sparsentan FSGS extension' acronym at NCT04557462 is not a known sparsentan FSGS trial — likely acronym/NCT fabrication.
AURORA-1 voclosporin lupus nephritis pivotal is NCT03021133; NCT02141672 does not correspond to the published AURORA-1 trial.
AURORA-2 voclosporin LN extension is NCT03597464; NCT03021499 does not match the published AURORA-2 extension.
Cenobamate study C017 is NCT02535091 (already used at id 2092); NCT01397968 is not the registered C017 trial — NCT/study-code mismatch suggesting fabricated bridging.
Perampanel pivotal Study 306 is NCT01161524; NCT01618695 does not correspond to perampanel Study 306 — likely fabricated NCT-to-acronym link.

NCT01261325 is already used at id 2094 (BRIVA-2 brivaracetam adjunctive); reassigned here to a different brivaracetam study N01252 with different outcomes — duplicate NCT across two distinct trials in same review.
NCT02862041 is the Passeo-18 Lux all-comers BIOLUX P-III registry, not commonly referenced as 'PASSEO-LUX'; acronym is non-standard.
NCT01949337 corresponds to the PREVAIL/PROSPER lineage of enzalutamide pivotals; 'AFFIRM-MET' is not the registered acronym for that NCT — AFFIRM was the post-chemo mCRPC trial (NCT00974311).
PMID 41290592 is implausibly high (PubMed IDs are currently <40M); acronym 'TRINITY' for toripalimab+EP in 1L ES-SCLC is not the standard registered acronym (real trial is EXTENTORCH).
